findings.name: Encoded PowerShell execution on workstation
findings.description: EDR flagged powershell.exe -EncodedCommand spawning from Office; likely IEX download cradle.

findings.name: LSASS memory access by non-system process
findings.description: Suspected credential dump via mimikatz sekurlsa against lsass.

findings.name: Lateral movement over RDP
findings.description: Interactive RDP / remote desktop sessions to multiple hosts on 3389 from a single source.

findings.name: Suspicious outbound HTTPS beacon
findings.description: Periodic https beacon to a low-reputation domain consistent with command and control.

findings.name: SQL injection in public-facing portal
findings.description: Pentest confirmed sqli on the internet-exposed login (web exploit / public-facing application).

findings.name: Shadow copy deletion observed
findings.description: vssadmin delete shadows executed; ransomware data encrypted for impact suspected.

findings.name: Informational: outdated TLS cipher suite
findings.description: Server still negotiates TLS 1.0; hardening recommendation only.
